intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the current visual evidence. P1 (String of Nickels), P2 (Mexican Mint), P3 (Pothos), and P4 (Silver Guest) are not visible as living specimens. The pots contain only soil and debris.

plant_audit.P1: No plant matter detected. Soil surface is dark and featureless.
plant_audit.P2: No plant matter detected. Pot appears empty.
plant_audit.P3: No plant matter detected. The white rabbit anchor is absent or obscured by debris.
plant_audit.P4: No plant matter detected. Shared space with P2 is barren.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently damp/dark across all pots; no signs of active root systems or surface growth.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white, crystalline or shell-like fragments in the foreground pot (P3/P4 area).
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no organic matter or spillover detected.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-5: No significant change; pots appear empty.
temporal_deltas.t-3_to_t-1: Lighting variance (T-2 shows near-total darkness/sensor failure), otherwise no biological progression.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: No recovery or new growth observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of total systemic failure. There is no evidence of chlorophyll-bearing tissue or viable plant structures. The environment appears to be a dormant or abandoned soil-based setup.
anomalies: White shell-like debris in P3/P4 pot.
Total absence of the white rabbit scale anchor.
Persistent lack of plant growth across all monitored intervals.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit confirms a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The pots are currently functioning as containers for soil only. No biological activity, germination, or survival is detected. The 'white rabbit' anchor is missing, suggesting a potential disturbance or removal of the original setup prior to the start of this sequence.
